headline: Jim Cramer Believes “Bank of America’s Way Too Cheap, It Should Be Bought”
summary: Bank of America Corporation (NYSE:BAC) was among the stocks on Jim Cramer’s Mad Money radar as he discussed the recent sell-off in AI-related stocks. headline: Gasoline Hits 4-Year High of $4.30. Americans Simply Won’t Stop Driving.
summary: A recent surge in prices may soon test just how much pain at the pump American drivers are willing to absorb.

headline: BAC Stock In Focus After Multi-Year Alaska Air Extension
summary: With stock buybacks of $18.66 billion in the 12 months through September 2025, Bank of America Corporation (NYSE:BAC) is among the 20 Stocks with the Biggest Share Buybacks. Bank of America Corporation (NYSE:BAC) and Alaska Air Group, Inc. announced on April 21 a multi-year extension of their co-branded credit card agreement, the bank’s largest co-brand partnership. The […]

headline: The catalyst for Microsoft's stock will be continued AI growth, says BofA's Tal Liani
summary: Tal Liani, Bank of America Securities senior software analyst, joins 'Squawk Box' to break down Microsoft's quarterly earnings results, growth of Azure and Copilot, and more.

headline: How The Apple (AAPL) Narrative Is Shifting On Services Strength, New Hardware And CEO Change
summary: Apple’s modeled fair value has edged up to $297.88 from $296.46, a small move that still catches attention for a company of this size. That shift is being linked to Street debates around App Store and Services trends, the MacBook Neo and broader hardware lineup, and how the early CEO transition might influence execution and growth expectations. Read on to see how these themes are shaping the evolving analyst narrative and what to watch as it continues to develop. Stay updated as the Fair...

headline: Private credit fears loom large over Europe’s banks this earnings season

headline: This major bank is going on a branch-opening spree
summary: The way we bank has changed rapidly over the past several decades. For a while, it seemed like fintechs would rise up and traditional banks would become a thing of the past. Today, you can do all of your banking on your smartphone and don’t even need to talk to a human to open a checking account if ...
